title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATO, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3395 / 57 OG No. 8, 1372 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2820, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATO, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Bato, Province of Catanduanes, are converted into barrios therein, to wit:

Sitio Mintay to Barrio Mintay;

Sitio Carorian to Barrio Carorian; and

Sitio Buenavista to Barrio Buenavista.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
